description: Decision tree and recipes for picking the right dither approach. Companion to presets/dither/{patterns,kernels}.json.

decision_tree.q1: Are you converting an external image (photo, AI gen) to a fixed palette?
decision_tree.q1_yes: Use error-diffusion via quantize_image_to_palette. Recommend: atkinson for crispy pixel-art look, floyd_steinberg for general use.
decision_tree.q1_no_q2: Are you painting by hand to suggest a gradient between 2 fixed colors?
decision_tree.q2_yes: Use a binary pattern from patterns.json. Recommend: checker_2 for 50/50 mix, dots_25 / dots_75 for asymmetric.
decision_tree.q2_no_q3: Are you trying to get retro low-res console feel?
decision_tree.q3_yes: Use kernels.ordered.bayer_4x4 - the visible cross pattern IS the aesthetic.
decision_tree.q4_yes: Use patterns.diagonal_left, cross_hatch, or hand-paint clusters per pixel-art principles.
decision_tree.q4_no: Probably you don't need dither. Add a 4th palette shade instead.

smooth_skin_gradient.tip: Apply only at the gradient boundary, not the whole skin area

AI_image_to_pixel_art.tip: Run pyxelate first to downsample, THEN dither

subtle_texture_overlay.tip: Place on a separate layer at 30-50% opacity, then merge

scanline_crt_effect.approach: patterns.hlines as overlay layer, full opacity, dark color
scanline_crt_effect.tip: Apply at end as post-process, not on individual sprite

engraving_grimoire.approach: patterns.cross_hatch in dark color over parchment base
engraving_grimoire.tip: Vary density: dense cross_hatch in deep shadow, single diagonal_left in mid-shadow

water_animation.tip: Combine with sparse highlights at wave crests

sky_gradient_at_low_res.approach: Manual hand-placed dither using checker_2 pattern, transitioning between 2 sky colors
sky_gradient_at_low_res.tip: Top 1/3: pure sky_top. Middle 1/3: checker_2. Bottom 1/3: pure sky_bottom.

anti_patterns.random_noise_dither: DON'T use random pixel scatter - reads as static. Always either ordered or hand-clustered.
anti_patterns.dither_for_low_color_count: If you only have 4 palette colors, dither just hides the limit and looks muddy. Add a 5th color instead.
anti_patterns.dither_at_8x8: Sprites smaller than 16x16 don't have room for dither patterns. Use solid shades.
anti_patterns.atkinson_for_smooth_gradient: Atkinson loses 25% of error - it WILL show banding on smooth gradients. Use Floyd-Steinberg or Stucki for smooth needs.
anti_patterns.dither_against_transparent: Dither against alpha channel hardcodes the BG color. Always dither against the actual ship-time BG.
